final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial product shot for a high-end jewelry brand featuring a sapphire and diamond set inspired by the deep ocean.

Style/medium: luxury jewelry advertising photography, Cartier and Tiffany top-tier campaign aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: multi-angle professional jewelry lighting setup, close-up shots highlighting necklace at collarbone, earrings framing the face, bracelet on wrist, medium close-up portrait
Subject: elegant East Asian female model with fair skin wearing a deep blue strapless gown, showcasing a jewelry set including necklace, earrings and bracelet; necklace features a 15-carat Sri Lankan royal blue sapphire center stone surrounded by 8 carats total of pear and round brilliant diamonds, platinum setting with intricate wave and coral engravings
Scene/backdrop: luxury yacht deck at night, gentle sea breeze, deep ocean and star-filled night sky in background
Lighting/mood: professional jewelry lighting system with multi-angle fill lights ensuring perfect fire and brilliance of gemstones, luxurious and mysterious atmosphere
Color palette: deep royal blue as anchor (sapphire and gown), brilliant white diamond sparkle, platinum silver metal tones, dark navy night sky
Materials/textures: lustrous platinum with fine wave and coral engravings, faceted sapphire with velvety depth, scintillating diamond facets, smooth porcelain skin, flowing silk gown fabric
Avoid: plastic-looking gemstones, flat lighting, over-processed skin, watermark, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer words
